parsed.answer: Waking a sleepwalker is generally safe and not harmful to them, contrary to the common myth that it could cause heart attacks or severe psychological damage. They may be confused, disoriented, or distressed upon waking, but there is no serious medical danger. It is often difficult to wake a sleepwalker because they are in deep non-REM sleep. The safest approach is to gently guide them back to bed without waking them, but if you must wake them, doing so calmly is fine.
